history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up image shows a large plush-like face with closed eyes and a small embedded video window of a seated person.

The main subject is a plush figure filling most of the frame, with a round gray-white face, closed curved eyes, a small smile, and three pink triangular shapes at the top that resemble hair or tufted features, with additional pink fabric along the lower edge.

In the background, the scene is mostly dominated by the plush subject; behind it there are indistinct darker areas and muted colors, and there is a small rectangular inset video image on the right showing a person’s head and upper shoulders.

Lighting appears soft and even on the plush face, while the inset video has brighter, indoor-style lighting. The camera angle is very close-up and centered on the plush face.

No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary: The image features a large plush character face shown up close, with a small picture-in-picture inset of a person on the right. The plush has closed eyes and a slight smile, and the inset shows a seated person facing the camera.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
